expectations.text: A new git commit was created even though no source files changed.
expectations.evidence: Commit created with CHECKPOINTS.md as only diff.

expectations.text: The commit subject names the root cause (nginx/cookie/domain/staging).
CHECKPOINTS.md exists and contains one dated entry matching the commit subject.
The commit body explains the root cause (cookie domain / nginx proxy).
The commit body references infra/nginx/staging.conf as the fix location.
The commit body states that app/auth.py is correct and was NOT changed.
expectations.evidence: 'app/auth.py confirmed correct — do NOT modify it'.

expectations.text: The commit body mentions the Monday maintenance window plan.
The commit body is substantive: more than 400 characters.
